title: Hi, is there any automation for "Every time period, if status is something, move item to this group"
excerpt: I want to basically move the “next sprint” status items to the top group on monday only that will be created on each monday (this has been set up with another automation). I am unsure how to do this but i noticed there’s…

posts.author: mizookie (Marzukh Akib Asjad)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to basically move the “next sprint” status items to the top group on monday only that will be created on each monday (this has been set up with another automation). I am unsure how to do this but i noticed there’s something similar which says “When date arrives, and if status is something, move item to group”. Much appreciated for the help thanks.

posts.author: Southernbks (Tori Breen)
posts.cookedHtml: I think that should work… I’m still learning myself but I use this automation.

posts.author: JCI_Tom (Thomas Vincent Conway)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same “wish.” I have a weekly sprint. On Sunday, I want to move the Completed items to the Finished group. I don’t see a way to do this. The “Every Time Period” trigger does not allow one to add a second criterion. Please add that ability Monday.com.

Thanks,

Tom
